name: Adalo No-Code Mobile App Builder API
what_it_does: No-code mobile and web app builder with external API collections — enabling non-technical users to create iOS, Android, and web apps with drag-and-drop builder, custom components marketplace, database, and API integrations, producing publishable native apps without writing code.
use_cases: Integrating external REST APIs with Adalo apps via Custom Actions for data operations
Reading and writing Adalo database records via Adalo's Data API for sync with external systems
Publishing native iOS and Android apps built without code for internal business tools
Connecting Adalo apps to external databases and services via API collections
Building MVP mobile apps quickly for validation before custom development investment
not_for: High-performance consumer apps (use native iOS/Android or React Native for performance)
Complex backend business logic (use low-code like OutSystems or custom code)
Web database applications without mobile need (use Knack or Caspio)
best_when: A startup or small business needs to publish a native mobile app to iOS/Android App Store without a developer — for MVPs, internal tools, or community apps — without the cost of custom mobile development.
avoid_when: You need high performance, complex logic, custom UI beyond what the builder offers, or apps with high user volumes.

auth.notes: App-specific API key from Adalo dashboard. Bearer token auth. App-scoped access to collections (database tables). External APIs configured in Adalo builder — API Collections for GET/POST/PUT/DELETE. No OAuth2 for Adalo's own Data API. No webhooks from Adalo — polling or external trigger required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 1 app, Adalo branding, limited features
pricing.notes: Austin, TX company. Founded 2018. Raised $8M Series A (2021). Backed by Craft Ventures, Andreessen Horowitz. No-code mobile app builder competing with Thunkable and Glide. Adalo Marketplace for custom components. App Store publishing included (iOS/Android). Database included (Adalo Collections). React Native underlying framework.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per plan; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Data API for app collections. API key bearer auth. Limited API documentation compared to developer platforms. App configuration in Adalo builder — API only accesses data layer. No webhooks — must poll. Custom Actions for external API calls configured in builder UI, not programmatically.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Record reads idempotent. Record creation not idempotent — no built-in duplicate prevention.
known_agent_gotchas: Data API is limited — main integration is via Custom Actions in Adalo builder UI
No webhooks — must poll Adalo Data API for changes
App publishing to App Store requires Apple Developer ($99/year) and Google Play ($25 one-time)
Performance limits: Adalo apps not suitable for high-traffic production apps
Free tier has Adalo branding — remove requires paid plan

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth. App data may include user PII — implement data minimization in Adalo collections. No fine-grained scopes — full app data access with API key.
